Know a provider we're missing?

If you know of a provider that gives free API tokens / free-tier access to LLM models and isn't listed here, open a GitHub issue — we'll add support for it.

+ Suggest a provider

Auto-generated by litellm-free-models-proxy · Cross-referenced with cheahjs/free-llm-api-resources. Free-tier API tokens — not open-source or self-hostable models. Tiers may change without notice; not affiliated with any provider.
